'''Talien''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Yarkora/Legends|Yarkora]] who played [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] in [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] and lost while on [[Onadax]]. He wore several gold rings in his nose.
